creator: kuteynikov@gmail.com
text:
When connecting to Main Site sysinstall types "Connecting (or logging) in to ftp@ftp.freebsd.org.." and nothing happens. I was waiting for a long period of time but it doesn't helped. Note that FreeBSD 6.2 worked fine. Choosing another mirror doesn't help too: it says that it couldn't connect/login/find  ftp.ru.freebsd.org. Maybe network connection is not valid? But bfe0 and DHCP was configured OK.
P.S. Why minimal system cannot be installed from bootonly CD?

How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD 7.0-BETA2 from bootonly CD via FTP.
